title: Low-income households face ‘remarkable’ rise in food insecurity in K-shaped economy: New York Fed
summary: The Federal Reserve Bank of New York reports a significant increase in food insecurity among low-income households, contributing to widespread economic anxiety among Americans. This trend reflects the K-shaped economic recovery where wealth gains concentrate at the top while lower-income populations face deteriorating living standards.
content: The rising threat of food insecurity is partly why Americans feel worse off than ever before, according to research by the Federal Reserve Bank of New York.

zh.title: 低收入家庭在K型经济中面临食品不安全的"显著"上升：纽约联邦储备银行
zh.summary: 纽约联邦储备银行报告低收入家庭食品不安全状况显著增加，加剧了美国人普遍存在的经济焦虑。这一趋势反映了K型经济复苏，其中财富收益集中在顶层，而低收入人口生活水平恶化。

title: Micron investors are partying like it’s 1987. Analysts say the stock still looks pretty cheap.
summary: Micron Technology shares are experiencing their best monthly performance in decades, with investors celebrating what analysts characterize as a value opportunity. Despite the rally, market analysts maintain that the stock remains attractively priced for continued upside.
content: Shares of Micron were headed for their best monthly performance since 1987, but analysts still see them as a value play.

zh.title: 美光投资者狂欢如同1987年。分析师表示该股票仍然看起来很便宜。
zh.summary: 美光科技股票正经历数十年来最好的月度表现，投资者为分析师称之为价值机会而欢欣鼓舞。尽管股价上升，市场分析师维持该股票仍具有吸引力价格且具有持续上升空间。

title: Stocks making the biggest moves midday: Marvell, Zscaler, United Airlines, Bath & Body Works & more
summary: Several major companies including Marvell, Zscaler, United Airlines, and Bath & Body Works are making significant moves during midday trading. This market activity reflects broader investor sentiment shifts across technology and consumer sectors.
content: Here are the companies making headlines in midday trading.

zh.title: 股票盘中最大涨跌：美满电子、Zscaler、美联航、Bath & Body Works等
zh.summary: 包括美满电子、Zscaler、美联航和Bath & Body Works在内的多家主要公司在盘中交易中出现重大波动。这种市场活动反映了整个科技和消费部门更广泛的投资者情绪转变。

title: Boeing CEO says company met requirements to increase 737 Max production to 47 jets per month
summary: Boeing CEO Kelly Ortberg announced the company has satisfied FAA requirements to escalate 737 Max aircraft production to 47 units monthly. This milestone represents a significant step in Boeing's recovery and the aircraft's return to full commercial viability.
content: Boeing CEO Kelly Ortberg said the company has met FAA requirements to ramp up its production of 737 Max aircraft to 47 per month.

zh.title: 波音首席执行官表示公司满足要求将737 Max产量增加至每月47架
zh.summary: 波音首席执行官凯利·奥尔特伯格宣布公司已满足美国联邦航空局(FAA)的要求，将737 Max飞机产量提升至每月47架。这一里程碑代表波音复苏的重要一步，也标志着该飞机恢复全面商业可行性。

title: Big Tech gets the AI profits. You get the higher utility bills.
summary: The rapid expansion of AI data centers is straining America's power grid, with costs being passed to consumers through higher utility bills while tech giants capture financial gains. This dynamic raises questions about how the benefits and burdens of AI infrastructure are distributed across society.
content: The AI data-center boom is quietly cannibalizing America’s power grid.

zh.title: 科技巨头获得AI利润。你获得更高的电费账单。
zh.summary: AI数据中心的快速扩展给美国电网造成压力，成本通过更高的电费账单转嫁给消费者，而科技巨头则获得财务收益。这种动态引发了关于AI基础设施的收益和负担如何在社会中分配的问题。

title: Here’s our monthly update on all 33 portfolio stocks, including 4 to buy right now
summary: Investment club host Jim Cramer provided monthly analysis of 33 portfolio holdings at his May meeting, highlighting four stocks currently recommended for purchase. The update emphasizes that viable investment opportunities extend beyond the popular AI sector.
content: AI stocks aren't the only place to put money to work, Jim Cramer said at the Investing Club's May Monthly Meeting.

zh.title: 以下是我们对全部33只投资组合股票的月度更新，包括现在要买的4只
zh.summary: 投资俱乐部主持人吉姆·克莱默在五月会议上对33个投资组合进行了月度分析，重点推荐了四只目前值得购买的股票。该更新强调，可行的投资机会不仅限于热门的AI领域。

title: Abercrombie shares jump 12% on earnings beat even as Iran conflict hits sales
summary: Abercrombie & Fitch stock surged 12% following better-than-expected earnings despite reporting a 10% sales decline in Europe, Middle East, and Africa due to regional conflict. The earnings beat suggests strong performance elsewhere offset geopolitical headwinds.
content: Abercrombie & Fitch saw sales in Europe, Middle East and Africa decline by 10%, thanks in large part to the conflict in the Middle East.

zh.title: 阿伯克龙比股价因业绩超预期上涨12%，尽管伊朗冲突冲击销售
zh.summary: 阿伯克龙比股价在业绩超预期后上涨12%，尽管欧洲、中东和非洲地区因地区冲突销售额下降10%。业绩超预期表明其他地区的强劲表现抵消了地缘政治逆风。

title: After Ferrari Luce backlash, Lamborghini CEO says canceling its own EV was the right choice
summary: Lamborghini's CEO defended the company's decision to discontinue its planned EV in favor of plug-in hybrid electric vehicles, citing strategic alignment with market demands. This move represents a divergent approach from Ferrari's controversial electric vehicle plans.
content: Lamborghini CEO said the automaker's decision to kill its EV to focus on plug-in hybrid electric vehicles was "the right way to go" for his company.

zh.title: 兰博基尼CEO表示取消电动车计划是正确决定
zh.summary: 兰博基尼CEO为公司放弃计划中的电动车、转向插电式混合电动车的决定辩护，理由是与市场需求战略一致。这一举措代表了与法拉利备受争议的电动车计划不同的方向。

title: Healthy Returns: Eli Lilly makes a new push into vaccines — here’s what to know
summary: Eli Lilly announced approximately $4 billion in acquisitions of three privately held vaccine manufacturers, signaling expansion into vaccine development. This strategic move positions the pharmaceutical giant to compete in high-growth vaccine markets.
content: The drugmaker announced it will buy three privately held vaccine makers in deals worth almost $4 billion combined.

zh.title: 礼来制药斥资40亿美元推进疫苗业务
zh.summary: 礼来制药宣布收购三家私人疫苗制造商，涉资约40亿美元，标志着该公司进一步拓展疫苗开发业务。这一战略举措使这家制药巨头能够在高增长的疫苗市场中竞争。

title: Trump opposes Russia or China taking Iran's highly enriched uranium
summary: Trump stated opposition to Russia or China acquiring Iran's highly enriched uranium while emphasizing the importance of keeping the Strait of Hormuz open for international shipping. These statements reflect concerns about geopolitical power dynamics and global energy security.
content: Trump also said the Strait of Hormuz, the vital oil-shipping route, is "going to be open to everybody."

zh.title: 特朗普反对俄罗斯或中国获取伊朗高浓缩铀
zh.summary: 特朗普表示反对俄罗斯或中国获取伊朗的高浓缩铀，同时强调保持霍尔木兹海峡对国际航运开放的重要性。这些声明反映了对地缘政治力量动态和全球能源安全的关切。

title: China’s next export shock walks on two legs — and costs less than a used car
summary: China is investing in humanoid robot development and manufacturing to reduce factory labor costs and establish competitive advantages in global markets. This emerging technology could represent a significant shift in global manufacturing and supply chains.
content: Beijing is funding humanoid robots to slash Chinese factory costs and build a competitive advantage.

zh.title: 中国的下一个出口冲击"行走"在两条腿上——成本低于二手车
zh.summary: 中国正在投资人形机器人的开发和制造，以降低工厂劳动成本并在全球市场中建立竞争优势。这项新兴技术可能代表全球制造和供应链的重大转变。

title: Investors betting the Iran war is ending are buying up travel stocks
summary: Travel industry stocks including Delta, United, and MGM experienced significant gains as investors positioned for potential Middle East conflict resolution. However, market strategists question whether optimism about peace is premature.
content: Shares of travel names Delta, United and MGM were among the S&P 500’s biggest gainers on Wednesday. But one strategist called the market’s optimism misplaced.

zh.title: 押注伊朗战争即将结束的投资者正在大量购买旅游股票
zh.summary: 包括达美航空、联合航空和美高梅在内的旅游业股票大幅上涨，因为投资者为中东冲突潜在解决而进行布局。但市场策略师质疑对和平的乐观情绪是否为时过早。

title: Traders are skeptical of Iran timeline for Strait of Hormuz reopening
summary: Despite reports suggesting Iran could restore Strait of Hormuz shipping flows within a month of a peace deal, traders on prediction market Kalshi are skeptical about meeting this timeline. This skepticism reflects concerns about implementation feasibility and geopolitical complications.
content: Despite reports Iran could return the passageway to normal traffic flows within a month of a peace deal, Kalshi traders thought that was unlikely.

zh.title: 交易员对伊朗霍尔木兹海峡重新开放时间表持怀疑态度
zh.summary: 尽管报告显示伊朗可能在和平协议签署后一个月内恢复霍尔木兹海峡的航运流量,但预测市场Kalshi上的交易员对实现这一时间表持怀疑态度。这种怀疑反映了人们对实施可行性和地缘政治复杂性的担忧。

title: Here’s how to find out if you’re one of millions of Americans who can claim this IRS refund
summary: Millions of Americans remain eligible to claim COVID-era tax refunds from the IRS, but the deadline for filing these claims is approaching. This unclaimed money represents significant potential savings for qualifying taxpayers.
content: Time’s running out to file for a COVID-era refund that could get you thousands of dollars back

zh.title: 如何查出你是否属于数百万美国人中可以申领国税局退款的之列
zh.summary: 数百万美国人仍有资格申领来自国税局的新冠疫情时代税收退款,但申报这些申请的截止日期即将到来。这笔未申领的款项对符合条件的纳税人来说代表了巨大的潜在储蓄。

title: The death of Nascar driver Kyle Busch is renewing the debate around indexed universal life insurance
summary: The death of NASCAR driver Kyle Busch has reignited discussion about the risks and limitations of indexed universal life insurance as a retirement planning tool. Experts caution that such policies should not be viewed as guaranteed or risk-free investments.
content: If you’re looking for a “sure thing” in a retirement plan, indexed universal life is probably not the answer.

zh.title: 赛车手凯尔·布什的去世重新引发了对指数万能寿险的争议
zh.summary: 赛车手凯尔·布什的去世重新引发了关于指数万能寿险作为退休规划工具的风险和局限性的讨论。专家告诫,这类保单不应被视为有保障或无风险的投资。

title: How a rise in energy bills will affect you from July
summary: UK household energy prices will increase by 13% in July due to rising wholesale costs driven by the US-Israel war with Iran. This marks the first time Middle East conflicts are directly impacting consumer energy bills.
content: Household energy prices will rise by 13% a year in July, as soaring wholesale costs caused by the US-Israel war with Iran hit bills for the first time.

zh.title: 七月起能源账单上升将如何影响你
zh.summary: 英国家庭能源价格将在七月上升13%,由美国-以色列与伊朗战争推动的批发成本上升所致。这是中东冲突首次直接影响消费者能源账单。

title: U.S. oil falls below $90 on report Iran agreement would restore Hormuz traffic in one month
summary: U.S. crude oil prices dropped 6% following reports that Iran would restore shipping traffic through the Strait of Hormuz under a framework agreement with the U.S. The deal could normalize a critical global trade route.
content: U.S. crude oil prices fell about 6% Wednesday on a report Iran would restore traffic through the Strait of Hormuz as part of a framework deal with the U.S.

zh.title: 伊朗协议将在一个月内恢复霍尔木兹海峡通航的报道推动美国油价跌破90美元
zh.summary: 美国原油价格下跌6%,因为报道称伊朗将根据与美国的框架协议恢复霍尔木兹海峡的航运通道。这项协议可能会使一条关键的全球贸易路线正常化。

title: Your AI agent can now trade for you on Robinhood. And buy stuff with your credit card too
summary: Robinhood now allows customers to create AI agents that can autonomously execute investment strategies and make purchases using credit cards with minimal human oversight. This represents a significant expansion of AI's role in personal finance.
content: The new products allow customers to create AI assistants capable of carrying out investing strategies or spending instructions with minimal human involvement.

zh.title: 你的AI代理现在可以在Robinhood上为你交易,还可以用信用卡购物
zh.summary: Robinhood现在允许客户创建AI代理,可以自主执行投资策略并以最少人工监督使用信用卡购物。这代表了AI在个人财务中角色的显著扩展。

title: Amazon starts selling its AI shopping technology to other retailers
summary: Amazon is expanding beyond its own operations by licensing its AI shopping technology to other retailers, with luxury brand Kate Spade as an early customer. This could accelerate AI adoption across the retail sector.
content: Amazon said it's already signed up Kate Spade as a customer for its AI shopping technology.

zh.title: 亚马逊开始向其他零售商销售其AI购物技术
zh.summary: 亚马逊通过向其他零售商授权其AI购物技术来扩展业务，奢侈品牌Kate Spade成为早期客户。这可能会加速AI在零售行业的采用。

title: Foot Locker returns to growth but weighs on Dick's Sporting Goods as earnings miss
summary: Dick's Sporting Goods reported that while sales surged following its Foot Locker acquisition, profitability declined due to high costs of turning around the struggling brand. The integration challenges highlight risks of retail consolidation.
content: Since acquiring Foot Locker, Dick's Sporting Goods sales have surged, but its profitability has taken a hit given the high costs of the brand's turnaround.

zh.title: Foot Locker恢复增长但拖累Dick's Sporting Goods业绩未达预期
zh.summary: Dick's Sporting Goods报告称，虽然收购Foot Locker后销售额激增，但由于扭转这一苦苦挣扎品牌的成本很高，盈利能力下降。整合挑战突显了零售整合的风险。

title: Energy shock starts to bite in Europe: UK household bills set for 'deeply unwelcome' 2-year high
summary: UK household energy bills are hitting 2-year highs as Middle East conflicts push up global energy prices, according to the UK's energy regulator. The escalating geopolitical tensions are creating direct financial pressures on European consumers.
content: “Ongoing conflict in the Middle East is impacting the price we pay for energy,” the head of the U.K.’s energy regulator said.

zh.title: 能源冲击在欧洲开始显现：英国家庭账单创2年新高令人"深感不悦"
zh.summary: 英国能源监管机构表示，随着中东冲突推高全球能源价格，英国家庭能源账单正创下2年新高。不断升级的地缘政治紧张局势正对欧洲消费者造成直接的财务压力。

title: Why this fund manager who was an early proponent of Nvidia is now betting on AI’s space frontier
summary: T. Rowe Price manager Tony Wang, an early Nvidia backer, is now identifying bottlenecks in AI infrastructure and investing in emerging opportunities in space and optics. This signals a potential shift in AI investment focus toward supporting infrastructure.
content: T. Rowe Price’s Tony Wang is looking AI for bottlenecks and finding them, and also sees returns in space and light.

zh.title: 为什么这位Nvidia的早期倡导者现在押注AI的太空前沿
zh.summary: T. Rowe Price基金经理Tony Wang是Nvidia的早期支持者，现在正在识别AI基础设施的瓶颈，并在太空和光学领域的新兴机会中投资。这表明AI投资焦点可能正在向支持基础设施转变。

title: Here are Wednesday's biggest analyst calls: Apple, Microsoft, SanDisk, FedEx, Micron, GE Aerospace, MGM & more
summary: Major Wall Street analysts issued significant recommendations on tech giants and industrial companies including Apple, Microsoft, and FedEx. These calls provide guidance for investors tracking blue-chip stocks.
content: Here are Wednesday's biggest calls on Wall Street.

zh.title: 周三最大的分析师评级：苹果、微软、西数、联邦快递、美光、通用航空航天、美高梅等
zh.summary: 华尔街主要分析师就包括苹果、微软和联邦快递等科技巨头和工业公司发布了重要建议。这些评级为投资者追踪蓝筹股提供了指导。

title: Lululemon settles proxy battle with founder Chip Wilson, agrees to two board nominees
summary: Lululemon has resolved its proxy dispute with founder Chip Wilson by agreeing to add two of his board nominees. The settlement ends months of conflict over the company's strategic direction.
content: Lululemon has been battling with founder Chip Wilson since December, as he says the company has lost its strategic vision and needs a new board of directors.

zh.title: 露露乐蒙与创始人Chip Wilson解决代理权争议，同意两名董事候选人
zh.summary: 露露乐蒙通过同意加入Chip Wilson的两名董事候选人，解决了与创始人的代理权争议。该协议结束了数月的关于公司战略方向的冲突。

title: 42% of homeowners say insurance costs have gone up 'a lot,' survey finds. Here's why
summary: A survey shows 42% of homeowners report significant increases in insurance costs driven by inflation, climate change, and other economic pressures. Rising homeowner insurance is creating broader economic headwinds for consumers.
content: Inflation, climate change and other factors have combined to push up premiums for homeowners insurance — with broad implications for consumers and the economy.

zh.title: 调查发现42%的房主称保险成本上升"很多"，原因如下
zh.summary: 一项调查显示，42%的房主报告保险成本大幅上升，这由通货膨胀、气候变化和其他经济压力驱动。不断上升的房主保险正在为消费者造成更广泛的经济逆风。

title: Why America is losing the AI productivity war to 3.5 million Chinese STEM graduates
summary: The U.S. faces a growing AI talent gap as China graduates 3.5 million STEM students annually, while American tech companies struggle with organizational inefficiencies. The talent imbalance threatens U.S. competitiveness in the AI era.
content: Big Tech’s structural mistakes are costing stock investors and fueling a massive talent crisis.

zh.title: 美国为何在AI生产力竞争中输给350万中国理工科毕业生
zh.summary: 由于中国每年培养350万名理工科学生，而美国科技公司在组织效率方面存在困难，美国面临日益增长的AI人才缺口。人才失衡威胁美国在AI时代的竞争力。

title: The market isn’t fully pricing in a peace deal yet, as investors see no alternative to U.S. stocks, says Barclays
summary: Barclays analysts note that markets haven't fully priced in potential peace from ongoing Middle East conflicts, with investors heavily favoring U.S. stocks as a safe haven. A peace resolution could rebalance global equity markets.
content: Since the start of the war in Iran, investors have favored U.S. stocks over international equities, but a deal could help to reduce the gap.

zh.title: 巴克莱表示市场尚未完全消化和平协议，投资者认为美国股票别无选择
zh.summary: 巴克莱分析师指出，市场尚未充分消化中东冲突可能和平的预期，投资者大幅倾向美国股票作为避险资产。和平解决可能会重新平衡全球股票市场。

title: OpenAI’s biggest problem isn’t AI safety. It’s Sam Altman.
summary: Critics argue that OpenAI's real risk isn't AI safety challenges but leadership issues under CEO Sam Altman, whose conflict-averse management style has fostered groupthink. This internal culture problem poses significant corporate governance concerns.
content: ‘Conflict-averse’ CEO has built a culture of groupthink — and a massive corporate liability,

zh.title: OpenAI最大的问题不是AI安全，而是Sam Altman
zh.summary: 评论人士认为，OpenAI的真实风险不在于AI安全挑战，而在于首席执行官Sam Altman领导下的领导力问题。他回避冲突的管理风格导致了从众思维的形成，这种内部文化问题引发了重大的公司治理隐患。

title: Market correction risk looks elevated as stocks hit record highs, top Europe central banker warns
summary: A top European central banker warns that market correction risks are rising as stocks reach record levels, citing Middle East tensions, stretched valuations, and private credit vulnerabilities. Multiple economic risks are converging to create instability.
content: The war in Iran, market valuations and private credit vulnerabilities all pose risks.

zh.title: 欧洲央行高管警告：股市创新高，市场回调风险上升
zh.summary: 欧洲央行一位高管警告称，随着股市创下历史新高，市场回调风险不断上升。他指出中东局势紧张、估值被拉高和私募信贷脆弱性等原因。多个经济风险汇聚，可能导致市场不稳定。

title: Stocks making the biggest moves premarket: Micron, ZScaler, MGM, Bath & Body Works and more
summary: Several major stocks including Micron, ZScaler, and MGM are posting significant premarket moves. These movements signal potential trading themes for the day ahead.
content: These are the stocks posting the largest moves premarket.

zh.title: 盘前涨跌幅最大的股票：美光、ZScaler、MGM、Bath & Body Works等
zh.summary: 美光、ZScaler和MGM等多只主要股票在盘前出现大幅波动。这些波动预示着今日交易的潜在主题和机会。

title: European markets open higher as oil prices hold below $100
summary: European stock markets opened higher Wednesday amid ongoing geopolitical tensions and military operations against Iran. The positive sentiment reflects investor confidence that oil prices remain contained below $100 per barrel. This matters as it indicates market stability despite regional uncertainties.
content: European stocks opened in positive territory on Wednesday as regional investors assess the latest military operations against Iran.

zh.title: 欧洲股市上涨 油价持稳在100美元以下
zh.summary: 欧洲股市周三在地缘政治紧张局势和对伊朗军事行动持续的背景下开盘上升。积极情绪反映了投资者对油价保持在每桶100美元以下的信心。这很重要，因为它表明尽管存在地区不确定性，市场仍保持稳定。

title: CNBC Daily Open: The $1 trillion club just got bigger
summary: SK Hynix and Micron have joined the exclusive $1 trillion market cap club, driven by surging demand for AI chips. Their ascension reflects the ongoing AI investment boom reshaping the semiconductor industry. This matters as it shows how dominant the AI narrative has become in driving valuations.
content: South Korea's SK Hynix and U.S. chip firm Micron become the latest companies to top $1 trillion in market capitalization as the AI rally resumes.

zh.title: CNBC每日开盘：1万亿美元俱乐部再添成员
zh.summary: SK海力士和美光因AI芯片需求激增而加入了排他性的1万亿美元市值俱乐部。他们的上升反映了正在进行的AI投资热潮重塑半导体行业。这很重要，因为它展示了AI叙事在推动估值方面已经变得多么主导。

title: Farmers' warning as milk prices fall below cost
summary: Milk prices have fallen below production costs, threatening the viability of family dairy farms across the region. Farmers warn this could accelerate consolidation and force more farms to sell without swift price recovery. This matters as it raises concerns about food security and rural economies.
content: Farmers worry more family farms will be sold unless dairy prices rise quickly.

zh.title: 牛奶价格跌破成本 农民发出警告
zh.summary: 牛奶价格已跌破生产成本，威胁到整个地区家庭奶牛场的生存能力。农民警告这可能会加速整合，并迫使更多农场在价格未能迅速恢复的情况下出售。这很重要，因为它引发了对粮食安全和农村经济的担忧。

title: We want everyone to use our 'very green grocery'
summary: A charity is operating a "very green grocery" that sells surplus and damaged stock to reduce waste and support consumers. The initiative aims to make sustainable shopping accessible while addressing food waste at scale. This matters as it demonstrates innovative approaches to circular economy and community support.
content: A charity selling over supplies and damaged stock say they want to cut waste and help people live.

zh.title: 我们希望每个人都能使用我们的'绿色超市'
zh.summary: 一个慈善机构运营着一家"绿色超市"，出售过剩和受损商品以减少浪费并支持消费者。该倡议旨在使可持续购物易于获得，同时大规模解决食品浪费问题。这很重要，因为它展示了循环经济和社区支持的创新方法。

title: Children's meals to be cheaper under VAT cut
summary: A VAT reduction to 5% on certain food items will lower children's meal costs in restaurants. This tax policy change aims to make dining out more affordable for families with young children. This matters as it provides relief from rising food costs for budget-conscious households.
content: The cost of children's meals in restaurants is set to come down as VAT on some items is cut to 5%.

zh.title: 儿童餐将在增值税减免后变得更便宜
zh.summary: 某些食品的增值税减至5%将降低餐厅儿童餐的成本。这一税收政策变化旨在使有小孩的家庭外出就餐更加经济实惠。这很重要，因为它为预算有限的家庭缓解了不断上升的食品成本压力。

title: 'I've given up eating hot meals to pay for equipment to keep my son alive'
summary: Over half of parents caring for disabled children report skipping meals to afford necessary medical equipment and care costs. This hardship reflects the financial strain placed on families with disabled dependents despite existing support systems. This matters as it highlights gaps in disability support and raises urgent questions about child welfare and family poverty.
content: More than half of parents of disabled children and young people are skipping meals to pay their bills.

zh.title: '我放弃了吃热饭来支付维持我儿子生命的设备费用'
zh.summary: 超过一半的照顾残疾儿童的父母报告说跳过用餐以承担必要的医疗设备和护理费用。这种困难反映了照顾残疾人的家庭所面临的经济压力，尽管存在现有的支持系统。这很重要，因为它突出了残疾支持中的空缺，并提出了关于儿童福利和家庭贫困的紧迫问题。

title: European companies double down on China manufacturing despite EU de-risking push
summary: European companies continue expanding manufacturing operations in China despite EU pressure to reduce economic dependence on Beijing. Low production costs outweigh supply chain diversification concerns for many businesses. This matters as it reveals the tension between geopolitical risk reduction and economic efficiency in corporate strategy.
content: Low manufacturing costs in China are keeping many European businesses' supply chains in the country despite pressure in the EU to reduce overseas reliance.

zh.title: 尽管欧盟推动去风险化，欧洲公司仍在中国制造业上加倍下注
zh.summary: 尽管欧盟施压减少对北京的经济依赖，欧洲公司继续在中国扩大制造业运营。低生产成本对许多企业来说超过了供应链多元化的关切。这很重要，因为它揭示了地缘政治风险降低与企业战略中经济效率之间的紧张关系。

title: SK Hynix has surged 250% this year. Analysts say the AI-fueled rally may be only halfway done
summary: SK Hynix stock has surged 250% year-to-date, driven by explosive AI demand for memory chips. Analysts predict the rally could continue for years given limited new production capacity and persistent cloud investment growth. This matters as it suggests semiconductors remain a prime beneficiary of the AI investment boom.
content: Analysts say the AI memory cycle still has years to run, with limited new capacity and surging cloud investment supporting further upside for SK Hynix.

zh.title: SK海力士今年飙升250%。分析师称AI驱动的涨势可能才走到一半
zh.summary: SK海力士股价年初至今飙升250%，受AI对存储芯片的爆炸性需求推动。鉴于新产能有限和云投资持续增长，分析师预测涨势可能持续多年。这很重要，因为它表明半导体仍然是AI投资热潮的主要受益者。

title: Why the UAE walked away from OPEC
summary: The UAE's departure from OPEC after six decades represents a significant realignment in global oil geopolitics. The move reflects frustration with production quotas, growing interest in maximizing oil revenue, and shifting alliances amid the Iran conflict and U.S. alignment. This matters as it signals potential fragmentation of OPEC's influence and broader Middle East geopolitical shifts.
content: The United Arab Emirates’ decision to leave OPEC after nearly 60 years marks a major shift in the global oil order. Officially framed as an economic decision, the move reflects Abu Dhabi’s frustration with production limits, its push to monetize oil reserves and a changing energy market where non-OPEC+ producers are gaining influence. But the timing also points to deeper geopolitical forces: the Iran war, shifting Gulf alliances and Abu Dhabi’s closer alignment with the U.S.

zh.title: 阿联酋为何退出欧佩克
zh.summary: 阿联酋在六十年后退出欧佩克代表了全球石油地缘政治的重大重组。此举反映了对产量配额的不满、最大化石油收入的兴趣增加，以及在伊朗冲突和美国联盟中的联盟转变。这很重要，因为它预示欧佩克影响力的潜在分化和更广泛的中东地缘政治变化。

title: China industrial profits jump 24.7% in April, fastest gain in over two years despite headwinds
summary: China's industrial profits surged 24.7% in April, marking the strongest growth in over two years driven by export strength and rising commodity prices. The gains were concentrated in upstream industries like energy and materials. This matters as it suggests China's economy may be stabilizing after earlier weakness despite ongoing structural challenges.
content: China’s industrial profits grew at their fastest pace in over two years in April, buoyed by stronger exports, higher producer prices and gains in upstream industries.

zh.title: 中国4月工业利润增长24.7%，创两年多来最快增速
zh.summary: 中国4月工业利润飙升24.7%，创两年多来最强增长，由出口强势和商品价格上涨驱动。增长集中在能源和材料等上游产业。这表明尽管面临持续的结构性挑战，中国经济在早期疲软后可能趋于稳定。

title: Booming AI chip demand helps create two new $1tn club members
summary: SK Hynix and Micron have reached $1 trillion market valuations, powered by surging AI chip demand. Their milestone reflects how artificial intelligence adoption is concentrating wealth in semiconductor manufacturers. This matters as it shows AI's outsized impact on tech valuations and supply chain criticality.
content: SK Hynix and Micron are the latest tech firms to join the growing list of stocks with mega valuations.

zh.title: 蓬勃发展的AI芯片需求助力两家公司成为万亿美元俱乐部新成员
zh.summary: SK海力士和美光已达到1万亿美元市值，由激增的AI芯片需求驱动。它们的里程碑反映了人工智能应用如何集中了半导体制造商的财富。这很重要，因为它表明AI对科技估值和供应链关键性的巨大影响。

title: Champion ethical hacker warns AI tools like Mythos could put her out of business
summary: A leading ethical hacker warns that advanced AI tools like Claude Mythos threaten to automate security testing work, potentially displacing professionals like herself from the cybersecurity field. This reflects broader concerns about AI disrupting established professional roles.
content: Chompie, one of the world's tops ethical hackers, says AI like Claude Mythos will make it harder for people like her to compete.

zh.title: 顶级伦理黑客警告AI工具如Mythos可能会让她失业
zh.summary: 一位领先的伦理黑客警告，像Claude Mythos这样的先进AI工具可能会自动化安全测试工作，可能会将她这样的专业人士从网络安全领域中取代。这反映了更广泛的AI扰乱既有专业角色的担忧。

title: ‘I feel like I’m living a lie’: My husband and I pretend we’re strapped for cash in front of friends. Is that bad?
summary: A couple maintains a facade of financial scarcity despite having substantial wealth to avoid social alienation and maintain peer connections. The practice raises questions about authenticity versus fitting in within social groups.
content: “I’ve found that acting ‘normal’ means others treat me like one of the group.”

zh.title: "我感觉自己在撒谎"：我和丈夫在朋友面前假装财务困难。这样做不好吗？
zh.summary: 一对夫妇尽管有可观的财富，但在朋友面前假装财务困难以避免社交隔离并维持同伴关系。这种做法引发了关于真实性与融入社交圈子之间的问题。

title: SK Hynix hits $1 trillion valuation as AI boom lifts South Korean chip stocks
summary: SK Hynix, a major South Korean memory chip manufacturer, has crossed the $1 trillion valuation threshold following an 11% stock surge driven by strong demand from the AI sector. This milestone reflects the pivotal role semiconductor makers play in the artificial intelligence boom.
content: Shares of SK Hynix soared over 11% on Wednesday, pushing the South Korean memory-chip maker above the $1 trillion market capitalization mark.

zh.title: 随着AI热潮推动韩国芯片股上涨，SK海力士突破1万亿美元估值
zh.summary: 主要的韩国存储芯片制造商SK海力士因AI行业强劲需求推动的股票上涨11%，已突破1万亿美元估值。这个里程碑反映了半导体制造商在人工智能繁荣中的关键作用。

title: Japan, South Korea stocks hit fresh records as markets weigh Iran tensions and ceasefire talks
summary: Japan and South Korea's stock markets reached record highs on Wednesday as investors balanced geopolitical tensions in Iran with optimism about potential peace negotiations. Regional economic momentum continues despite uncertainty over global conflict.
content: Asia-Pacific markets rose on Wednesday, with Japan and South Korea's benchmark indices hitting new highs

zh.title: 日本和韩国股市创新高，市场权衡伊朗局势与停火谈判
zh.summary: 周三，日本和韩国股市创下历史新高，投资者在伊朗地缘政治紧张局势与潜在和平谈判的乐观态度之间权衡。尽管全球冲突前景存在不确定性，地区经济势头仍保持强劲。
